## [03:01 - 06:02]

50 times bigger, I think. I think I'm getting the math right. So decide on a market, but it doesn't have to be the ultimate where you stay forever. Almost no one stays in one market forever. But decide on that market and start building your presence. Get out there, start to interact with people in your market. Engage with them. Find out what they want. Find out what their hot points are. You keep on getting better with your message and you sharpen your message. If people are not buying your products, change your offer, or change your messaging around the offer, just decide though, that you're gonna succeed.
